use_cases: Displaying interactive video content on landing pages with thumbnail preview and full playback
Creating video galleries in media and content platforms
Showcasing product demos or feature walkthroughs on SaaS landing pages
Building course libraries with video preview functionality in education platforms
Featuring product demonstration videos in e-commerce product listings
ai_summary: An interactive video thumbnail player component that displays a clickable thumbnail with play overlay and opens a modal for full video playback. Implements keyboard navigation (Escape to close, Enter to open), accessibility features with aria-labels, and body scroll prevention when the modal is active. The component supports configurable aspect ratios and uses clean, minimal styling suitable for professional video content presentation across various industries.
